bead.title: docs: remove normal-install guidance pointing at .ddx/plugins/ddx
bead.description:
PROBLEM
CLI help and frontend/e2e fixture documentation still tell users or contributors to look for DDx package resources under .ddx/plugins/ddx. That conflicts with the intended marketplace/cache-backed topology and can cause users to commit or depend on generated payload copies.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-13-ddx-skill-package-layout.md:18-27 says generated adapters and payload copies are not forward repository state.
- cli/cmd/skills.go:27-32 advertises checking .ddx/plugins/ddx.
- cli/internal/server/frontend/README.md:85-105 describes the e2e fixture as containing .ddx/plugins/ddx resources, which conflicts with generated-adapter/cache topology.

PROPOSED FIX
Revise CLI help text and frontend/e2e fixture documentation so normal marketplace installs describe generated adapters plus cache/defaultplugin resolution, not .ddx/plugins/ddx. Mention .ddx/plugins/ddx only where explicitly describing local development overlays or legacy compatibility.

NON-SCOPE
Do not remove support for explicit local development overlays. Do not remove the embedded default plugin fallback needed for offline ddx init. Do not change HELIX marketplace packaging.

PARENT
ddx-602ae31a

GOVERNING ARTIFACT
- docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-13-ddx-skill-package-layout.md:18-27
bead.acceptance:
1. TestSkillsHelpDoesNotRecommendBuiltinProjectPayloadPath proves skills-related CLI help no longer tells users to check .ddx/plugins/ddx for normal installs.
2. TestFrontendReadmeDescribesCacheBackedFixtureTopology proves cli/internal/server/frontend/README.md describes generated adapters and cache/defaultplugin resolution instead of normal .ddx/plugins/ddx resources.
3. TestDocsMentionProjectPayloadOnlyForLocalOverlayOrLegacyCompatibility proves remaining .ddx/plugins/ddx mentions in the touched docs are limited to explicit local-overlay or legacy compatibility context.
4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/registry/... ./internal/config/... ./cmd/... ./internal/server/frontend/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
